Mayo ↔ Whitehorse

Route Length

What We Move

One route, done well. Practical freight coordination for the Mayo–Whitehorse corridor.

Weekend Freight Runs

Dependable scheduled freight service between Mayo and Whitehorse for businesses, organizations, contractors, and local customers who need a reliable weekend supply link.

Request Quote

Whitehorse Supplier Pickups

Pickup service from Whitehorse suppliers, retailers, and service providers, coordinated for delivery back to Mayo.

Request Quote

Business Restock Delivery

Recurring or as-needed freight support for Mayo businesses that need stock, supplies, parts, or operational materials moved from Whitehorse.

Request Quote

Contractor & Project Freight

Freight coordination for contractors, site work, maintenance teams, and project-based operations needing materials, tools, or supplies moved on the Mayo–Whitehorse route.

Request Quote

Custom Freight Requests

Need something outside the standard run? Contact 40 Mile Supply for custom freight coordination, special handling questions, or one-off transport requests.

Request Quote

How It Works

Simple process, clear communication — quote to delivery.

01

Request a Quote

Tell us what you need to move, when, and where. We respond with clear next steps.

02

Confirm Details

We confirm pickup, contact, and any instructions so the run goes smoothly.

03

Weekend Run

Freight moves on our scheduled weekend route between Mayo and Whitehorse.

04

Delivery

Delivered to your chosen location. Straightforward and done.

Ready to move freight?

Mayo to Whitehorse,
on a schedule you can plan around.

Get a Freight Quote Call Us
40 Mile Supply

Mayo-based freight service. Dependable weekend runs between Mayo and Whitehorse — practical local service on the Silver Trail.
